function.name: lte_gold_unscram
function.signature: static inline unsigned int lte_gold_unscram(unsigned int *x1, unsigned int *x2, unsigned char reset)

bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function lte_gold_unscram in the openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT/ulsch_decoding.c:376.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
